{{Quote|Damnable Gamorreans. Can't trust 'em. Hey! Spare a credit? I'll let you in on some information|Oxbel|<ref name="GG7" />}}
'''Oxbel''' was a [[Devaronian/Legends|Devaronian]], one of only three who lived on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. He was friends with [[Kardue'sai'Malloc/Legends|Kardue'sai'Malloc]], also known as Labria.<ref name="GG7" /> He once attempted a scam along with Kardue'sai'Malloc where they pretended to be brothers, which failed.
